description: hobbyist, practitioner and diarist voices — the workhorse of the filtered web
Reddit-style threads and comment sections; several distinct voices; disagreement stays unresolved
journalist-written local, national or trade press
journalistic long reads, essays, profiles, memoir excerpts, editorials
encyclopedia-style article, explainer, textbook excerpt; neutral moderated-platform register
Quora / Stack Exchange style — an explicit question plus answers
WikiHow-style guides, recipes with headnotes, DIY writeups
paper sections, abstracts, lit reviews, thesis excerpts — upweighted vs. raw crawl, as curated mixes do
podcast, radio interview, lecture or hearing transcript; spoken-register text, disfluencies allowed
short stories and novel excerpts — books are a real pretraining slice; AI-character stories live here
press releases, org blogs, member newsletters; institutional first-person-plural voice
